allow: Bash(node -e "const routes = \(await import\('./central-hub/routes/services.mjs'\)\).serviceRoutes; const mock={serviceRegistry:{getAllServices\(\){return []},getStatus\(\){return {totalServices:0,proxiedServices:0,lastUpdate:null}},validateService\(\){return {valid:true,errors:[]}},async addService\(service\){return service},getServiceById\(id\){return id==='x'?{id:'x',lucky:{},sunpanel:{}}:null},async updateService\(id,updates\){return {id,...updates}},async deleteService\(\){}}}; const router = routes\(mock\); const paths = router.stack.filter\(layer=>layer.route\).map\(layer=>\({path: layer.route.path, methods:Object.keys\(layer.route.methods\)}\)\); console.log\(JSON.stringify\(paths,null,2\)\);")

Bash(node -e "const fs = require\('fs'\); const html = fs.readFileSync\('./central-hub/public/index.html','utf8'\); const checks = ['serviceForm','serviceList','servicesSummaryTotal','function loadServices\(','function submitServiceForm\(','/services/validate']; for \(const check of checks\) { if \(!html.includes\(check\)\) { throw new Error\('missing:'+check\); } } console.log\('ui markers ok'\);")

Bash(node -e "const base='http://127.0.0.1:51000/api/services'; const createPayload={id:'tmp-ui-check',name:'临时校验服务',device:'200',internalPort:8443,enableProxy:true,proxyDomain:'tmp-ui-check.leecaiy.shop',proxyType:'reverseproxy',enableTLS:true,description:'tmp',lucky:{remark:'tmp'},sunpanel:{group:'NAS',icon:'https://tmp-ui-check.leecaiy.shop/favicon.ico',lanUrl:'https://192.168.3.200:8443'}}; const invalidPayload={...createPayload,id:'',proxyDomain:'bad.example.com'}; const updatePayload={description:'updated from verification',sunpanel:{group:'服务器'}}; const req = async \(path, options={}\) => { const res = await fetch\(base+path,{headers:{'Content-Type':'application/json'},...options}\); const data = await res.json\(\).catch\(\(\)=>\({}\)\); return {status:res.status,data}; }; const run = async \(\) => { console.log\('validate invalid', JSON.stringify\(await req\('/validate',{method:'POST',body:JSON.stringify\(invalidPayload\)}\), null, 2\)\); console.log\('create', JSON.stringify\(await req\('/add',{method:'POST',body:JSON.stringify\(createPayload\)}\), null, 2\)\); console.log\('update', JSON.stringify\(await req\('/tmp-ui-check',{method:'PUT',body:JSON.stringify\(updatePayload\)}\), null, 2\)\); console.log\('delete', JSON.stringify\(await req\('/tmp-ui-check',{method:'DELETE'}\), null, 2\)\); }; run\(\).catch\(err=>{console.error\(err\); process.exit\(1\);}\);")

Bash(node -e "const base='http://127.0.0.1:51000/api/services'; const createPayload={id:'tmp-ui-check',name:'临时校验服务',device:'200',internalPort:8443,enableProxy:true,proxyDomain:'tmp-ui-check.leecaiy.shop',proxyType:'reverseproxy',enableTLS:true,description:'tmp',lucky:{remark:'tmp'},sunpanel:{group:'NAS',icon:'https://tmp-ui-check.leecaiy.shop/favicon.ico',lanUrl:'https://192.168.3.200:8443'}}; const updatePayload={description:'updated from verification',sunpanel:{group:'服务器'}}; const req = async \(path, options={}\) => { const res = await fetch\(base+path,{headers:{'Content-Type':'application/json'},...options}\); const data = await res.json\(\).catch\(\(\)=>\({}\)\); return {status:res.status,data}; }; const run = async \(\) => { console.log\('create', JSON.stringify\(await req\('/add',{method:'POST',body:JSON.stringify\(createPayload\)}\), null, 2\)\); console.log\('update', JSON.stringify\(await req\('/tmp-ui-check',{method:'PUT',body:JSON.stringify\(updatePayload\)}\), null, 2\)\); console.log\('list', JSON.stringify\(await req\('/list'\), null, 2\)\); console.log\('delete', JSON.stringify\(await req\('/tmp-ui-check',{method:'DELETE'}\), null, 2\)\); }; run\(\).catch\(err=>{console.error\(err\); process.exit\(1\);}\);")

Bash(node -e "import\('./central-hub/modules/service-registry.mjs'\).then\(async \({ServiceRegistry}\) => { const registry = new ServiceRegistry\({enabled:true}, {state:{}, save: async\(\)=>{}}\); registry.services = [{ id:'svc1', name:'服务1', device:'200', internalPort:443, enableProxy:true, proxyDomain:'svc1.leecaiy.shop', proxyType:'reverseproxy', enableTLS:true, lucky:{port:50000, remark:'old', advancedConfig:''}, sunpanel:{group:'NAS', icon:'https://svc1.leecaiy.shop/favicon.ico', lanUrl:'https://192.168.3.200:443'} }]; registry.saveRegistry = async \(\) => {}; registry.updateState = async \(\) => {}; const updated = await registry.updateService\('svc1', { description:'patched', sunpanel:{group:'服务器'} }\); console.log\(JSON.stringify\(updated, null, 2\)\); }\).catch\(err => { console.error\(err\); process.exit\(1\); }\);")
